title: Paint Brush Holder, Wooden 67 Hole Citadel Paint Rack, Wall-Mounted Paint Rack, for Brushes, Sketch Pens, Colored Pens, Makeup Brushe
features: Environmentally Friendly Material: Made from high-quality and eco-friendly wood, paintbrush holder non-toxic and odorless. The surface is carefully polished, smooth and delicate, and does not harm hands. It can be used worry free for a long time
Large Capacity Design: The paint holder provides up to 67 holes, with 5 different diameter hole positions, easily accommodating brushes and other creative tools of various sizes

Easy to Assemble: The paint brush holders adopt a detachable design, making assembly easy. You can place the paint station on the desktop or wall as needed, saving space while improving work efficiency and creative enjoyment

Ideal Storage Solution: citadel paint storage can help you keep your desk tidy and orderly, making your work more enjoyable and efficient. This paint organiser is a practical gift for painting enthusiasts and children
Widely Applicable: In addition to serving as a warhammer paint storage, this product is also suitable for organizing pencils, pens, sketching tools, and beauty brushes, meeting various scene needs
